intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Dry, compacted, and devoid of organic root structures.
biome_observations.debris: Presence of a spoon (T-4 to Current) and a white object (T-5) which appears to be a discarded tag or plastic fragment, not the rabbit anchor.

temporal_deltas.T-5_to_T-1: The environment shows no biological activity. The introduction of a metal spoon in the yellow pot area (T-4) suggests human intervention, likely for soil manipulation or maintenance, but no plant recovery occurred.
temporal_deltas.Current: The state remains static and barren.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently non-viable. There is no evidence of photosynthesis or plant life. The specimens are either dead or have been removed entirely.
anomalies: Absence of the white rabbit scale anchor (P3) in all frames.
Complete lack of vegetative growth across all pots.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a complete failure of the botanical system. The pots are present but contain only substrate. The absence of the scale anchor (white rabbit) and the presence of a spoon suggest a failed attempt at propagation or a complete clearing of the pots. The environment is currently a 'dead' biome.
